seoTitle: Hendra vs Heritage Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hendra and Heritage Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hendra vs Heritage Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hendra and Heritage Park.
heading: Hendra vs Heritage Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hendra, Queensland and Heritage Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Heritage Park has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Hendra (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hendra or Heritage Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hendra has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Heritage Park scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hendra scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Heritage Park scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hendra or Heritage Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Heritage Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
